channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: ID@Xbox Showcase April 2026—Everything Announced
item.content:encoded:
It’s springtime, and that means showcase season is upon us, this time with the ID@Xbox Showcase. On Thursday, April 26, Xbox held its ID@Xbox showcase for April 2026 in partnership with IGN.

This is the first ID@Xbox Showcase since October 2025. That show featured games like Mouse P.I. For Hire, Invincible VS, Planet of Lana 2, and 33 Immortals, among others.

The broadcast starts at 1pm ET/10am PT, and features indie games like Aphelion, Misfall Hunter, Solo Leveling Arise Overdrive, and much more. There’s even been teases of a “surprise” coming during the event for gamers.

  • More Insider Gaming: Galaxies Showcase Spring 2026—Everything Announced

You can check out everything that was announced during the event below. Be sure to let us know your thoughts on the showcase in the comments, or join this and more discussions in the official Insider Gaming Discord. It’s worth noting that everything is in the order it was shown.

Everything Announced At The ID@Xbox Showcase April 2026

As games are shown, they will be updated below in the order they appeared. If something is missing, please let us know in the comments. Trailers will also be added as they become available.

For even more upcoming games, check out everything that was announced during the recent Triple-I Showcase. And for even more Insider Gaming delivered directly to your inbox, sign up for our newsletter.

Mike has been covering the gaming industry since 2012, and has reported on some of the largest events in the industry while also working as an investigative reporter. Outside of…

More from Mike Straw

item.title: Don’t Worry, Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Isn’t An RPG
item.content:encoded:
During the Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Showcase, Ubisoft announced that the game will not be an RPG, despite previous rumors.

In a direct response to a question over what Black Flag Resynced actually is, it was said, “This remains a solo adventure and character-driven experience. It is not an RPG.”

Overhauls Galore

Despite the game remaining a solo adventure, Black Flag Resynced comes with a plethora of upgrades, including enhancing underwater exploration, a new weather system that will affect your ship’s movement, and more.

In addition, Black Flag Resynced will also include new character missions for three brand-new crewmates, additional content for Edward Kenway, and more.

They were simpler times indeed. Times change, though, and as we’ve come to learn with Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced, the combat will be updated, just like the modern-day Animus has, and as have tailing/eavesdropping missions.

Through a leaked Resynced presentation, we’ve been able to gather key details about the remake, including Edward Kenway’s original voice actor returning for the role.

The full updates can be seen in the Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Showcase here.

Will you be buying Assassin’s Creed Resynced? Let us know what you think via the free-to-join and always lively Insider Gaming Discord.

We have more Resynced content from the Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Collector’s Edition goodies being revealed, to the news that Resynced doesn’t include DLC or Multiplayer.

Tom Henderson is Insider Gaming's Co-Founder and Editor-In-Chief. When he's not running one of the industry's leading independent video game websites, he's probably playing an FPS like Call of Duty,…

More from Tom Henderson

item.title: Complete Lacrosse 26 Trophy List—How To Get All Achievements & Trophies
item.content:encoded:
The ultimate goal in any sport is winning a trophy, so what better thing to aim for in Lacrosse 26 than the trophies? Or, if you’re on Xbox, you can still gun for 100% completion, to prove that you’re the ultimate Lacrosse player.

Insider Gaming was the first to break news on Lacrosse 26 and its gameplay details, and you’ll need to master every one of them if you want to earn every trophy the game has to offer.

If you’re wondering what it takes to do so, you’re in the right place, as Insider Gaming has the full trophy and achievement list below.

How Many Achievements & Trophies In Lacrosse 26?

It’s a very short list, as there are only 10 achievements and trophies to earn in Lacrosse 26—with no Platinum in sight.

Usually, when it comes to trophy hunting, a list with around 20 to 30 achievements is considered a small one, but 10? That certainly takes the cake. That being said, experienced completionists will know that it’s not necessarily how long the trophy list is, but how difficult the individual achievements are to earn.

  • More Insider Gaming: New Lacrosse 26 Details Ahead of April 24 Release

And with no platinum in sight, it’s bound to put off a few prospective hunters, but there are still ten lovely golds to claim instead. So, without further ado, it’s time to check out the complete Lacrosse 26 trophy list and see how tough that 100% completion will be.

All Lacrosse 26 Trophies & Achievements

It’s a very straightforward set of achievements when it comes to Lacrosse 26’s trophy list, as you won’t have to do any outrageous or difficult tasks.

Generally speaking, you’ll simply need to engage with Lacrosse 26’s selection of game modes, namely Franchise mode. So long as you’re scoring goals and winning games, you should earn every trophy with ease.

  • More Insider Gaming: Answering Your Questions About Lacrosse 26

Here’s every trophy and achievement in Lacrosse 26:

Will you be trying to earn every trophy in Lacrosse 26? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more trophy guides, check out the following lists:

  • Saros
  • Forza Horizon 6
  • Pragmata

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: NYT Connections Hints Today (#1047)—Answers for Thursday, April 23
item.content:encoded:
It’s time for you to crack on with an all-new NYT Connections puzzle, and I’m here with the best answers and hints you’ll find anywhere. If you’re stuck on today’s challenge, you can simply scroll down, check out the clues I’ve offered, or go one step further and take the NYT Connections solutions to get it wrapped up quickly.

How to Play NYT Connections

In June 2023, NYT Connections emerged as yet another game in the ever-growing lineup of the New York Times titles. This title soared immediately, and it’s easy to see why. As a free-to-play, accessible New York Times game, NYT Connections is available worldwide and can be played on desktop devices or in a mobile app.

But how do you play NYT Connections?

The NYT team will provide you with a grid of 16 words once a day. The only task left up to you is to sort those words into four groups of four by finding their commonalities. Every NYT Connections puzzle has just one solution, and some words can have double meanings, so it can sometimes be tricky to figure out the answers.

It’s also important to stress that the words are color-coded: yellow, blue, green, and purple. That’s in order of difficulty, from least to most.

What’s critical here is that you get four guesses every day, and if you use those, your NYT Connections answers for today will be out of reach, as it’ll be game over.

Today’s NYT Connections Hints (April 13)

Here are the words from today’s NYT Connections puzzle:

  • MOTHER
  • MY
  • NEIGHBOR
  • TOTORO
  • TOUCH
  • WHAMMY
  • SKIRT
  • SCIENCE
  • PULP
  • EDUCATED
  • LITERARY
  • ASIAGO
  • DEVOTE
  • VERY
  • HISTORICAL
  • FLANK

And here are the hints I can offer for today’s NYT Connections:

  • Yellow – Words you’d associate with the border of something
  • Green – Words you’d associate with fiction topics
  • Blue – Words you’d find within a planetary mnemonic
  • Purple – Words that are made up of old band names

Here’s the final warning before we get to the NYT Connections answers for today, April 23:

Are you sure you want to scroll further?

Very well!

NYT Connections Answers Explained for Today, April 23 (#1047)

If you want to jump straight to the answers for today’s NYT Connections puzzle, I’ve got you covered:

  • Yellow – FLANK, NEIGHBOR, SKIRT, TOUCH
  • Green – HISTORICAL, LITERARY, PULP, SCIENCE
  • Blue – EDUCATED, MOTHER, MY, VERY
  • Purple – ASIAGO, DEVOTE, TOTORO, WHAMMY

When Does NYT Connections Reset?

That’s today’s puzzle, but if you want the next one, the game resets daily at midnight local time (that’s your local time). You’ll have 24 hours to complete the puzzle when midnight ticks over in your timezone.

How did you do? Did you get a perfect run? Let me know what your streak looks like on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Conan Exiles Enhanced Will Give You More Control Over Your Junk
item.content:encoded:
That’s right, that’s exactly what I meant by that title. Funcom has just unveiled Conan Exiles Enhanced, a gargantuan overhaul to the base game that’s coming for free on May 5th to all existing owners on Steam. It’s a monumental thing that upgrades the game to UE5, enhances the base UI, introduces new building mechanics, and much more.

It also brings a major feature that’s dubbed ‘Enhanced Endowment Slider.’ If you’re at all familiar with Conan Exiles, the nearly ten-year-old survival title, you’ll know what the team means by that…

Bigger, Better Weapons in Conan Exiles Enhanced

Now, let me preface this by saying that the press release for Conan Exiles Enhanced doesn’t explain what the Enhanced Endowment Slider is. Therefore, it’s up to us to imagine exactly what that could mean.

It’s worth stressing that the entire release and mood board for the Enhanced upgrade is super serious, talking about the wonderful overhaul to the game’s base make-up, the new UI, the enhanced engine, and so on, and then in the corner, you’ve got penises.

Even the huge FAQ for the upgrade doesn’t mention the new slider feature. We’re truly being kept in the dark about this until May 5th, when the update arrives.

In case you’re unfamiliar with Conan Exiles, I’ll explain how it’s a brutal and unabashed game that doesn’t sugarcoat anything about the harsh world you’re forced to survive in. You start your journey buck naked, and when crafting your character, you get to choose how well-equipped you are in the most intimate way possible.

It looks like Funcom has expanded on that concept, introducing the Enhanced Endowment Slider. In the small image that occupied the top corner of the mood board, all we can see is something rather large, obscured by a black box.

Is it something artistic? Are we talking deeper customization, or controlling the angles of things? Is this like Cyberpunk 2077, and we’re about to have artisanal pubic hair? The mind boggles.

It’s worth pointing out that not everything is getting bigger in Conan Exiles Enhanced. The base game’s install size has been slashed by two-thirds, going from 120 GB down to a measly 40 GB. How ironic!

What do you think the Enhanced Endowment Slider is all about? Let us know your thoughts on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that Crimson Desert now has an easy mode

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill
